# PRSG-001 — Map of Content

A normal gated spec-MOC, present so the home note WOULD have a row to index if it
were well-formed. The FR-017a fail-safe must fire on the malformed home note before
any write, so this spec-MOC must also be left byte-for-byte unmodified.
